hero.title: Don't Struggle, Make It
hero.subtitle: Your personal AI study assistant that transforms your study notes into flashcards and study briefs in seconds.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to transform your study materials into effective learning tools.

upload.title: Upload Your Notes
upload.description: Simply upload your lecture notes or study materials. Works with PDFs, Word docs, text files and more.

process.title: AI Processing
process.description: Our advanced AI analyzes your content and automatically generates comprehensive flashcards and study briefs.

learn.title: Start Learning
learn.description: Review and learn with your personalized study materials. Track your progress and master subjects efficiently.

whyUs.title: Why Students Are Obsessed
whyUs.subtitle: Created by students who understand the struggle, for students who deserve better.

saveTime.title: Save Massive Time
saveTime.description: Our AI-powered system transforms lengthy notes into concise, memorable study materials within minutes, freeing you to focus where it matters most.

grades.title: Level Up Your Grades
grades.description: Our organized study materials help boost retention and understanding, leading to improved exam performance and higher overall grades.

smarter.title: Study Smarter, Not Harder
smarter.description: Our intelligent tools help you focus on what you need to learn, maximizing study efficiency and helping you master complex topics.

whyUs.joinOthers: Join 10,000+ students already crushing their studies

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the perfect plan for your study needs with no hidden fees

pro.title: Pro
pro.subtitle: Everything you need to ace your classes

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Study Experience?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of students who are already studying smarter

newsletter.title: Stay Updated with Brief
newsletter.subtitle: Get the latest updates about new features and study tips delivered to your inbox

footer.description: Helping students transform the way they study and learn with AI-powered tools

security.passwordMessage: You can reset your password by clicking the button below. We'll send you an email with instructions.
security.twoFactorMessage: Enhance your account security by enabling two-factor authentication. This will require a verification code when you sign in.
security.deleteWarning: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Settings
accessibility.message: Customize your experience to make the application more accessible to your needs.
accessibility.reducedMotionDescription: Minimize animations and transitions throughout the interface
accessibility.alwaysShowFocus: Always show focus indicators when navigating with keyboard
accessibility.accessibilityCommitment: We're committed to making our platform accessible to everyone. If you have any specific accessibility needs that aren't addressed here, please
